columns.name: ORDRNR
columns.description: Unique order identifier

columns.name: ENTNO
columns.description: Entry number within the document

columns.name: CUSTNO
columns.description: Customer identification number

columns.name: VONO
columns.description: Document version identifier

columns.name: VODT
columns.description: Date of the document version

columns.name: VALDT
columns.description: Date of value or transaction

columns.name: ACYR
columns.description: Year for accounting purposes

columns.name: ACPR
columns.description: Period within the accounting year

columns.name: VOTP
columns.description: Budget or vote number

columns.name: TXT
columns.description: Free text description

columns.name: CUR
columns.description: Currency of the transaction

columns.name: EXRT
columns.description: Exchange rate for currency conversion

columns.name: CURAM
columns.description: Amount in the document's currency

columns.name: INVONO
columns.description: Invoice reference number

columns.name: REF
columns.description: Internal or external reference

columns.name: ST
columns.description: Current status of the document

columns.name: INTRT
columns.description: Interest rate applicable to the transaction

columns.name: QTY
columns.description: Number of units involved in the transaction

columns.name: R1
columns.description: Additional information field 1 (possibly used for status or reference)

columns.name: R2
columns.description: Additional information field 2 (possibly used for status or reference)

columns.name: R3
columns.description: Additional information field 3 (possibly used for status or reference)

columns.name: R4
columns.description: Additional information field 4 (possibly used for status or reference)

columns.name: R5
columns.description: Additional information field 5 (possibly used for status or reference)

columns.name: R6
columns.description: Additional information field 6 (possibly used for status or reference)

columns.name: SRCTP
columns.description: Type of data source or transaction origin

columns.name: SRCJNO
columns.description: Number of the source journal (may link to other tables)

columns.name: ERR
columns.description: Flag indicating presence of errors or issues

columns.name: AGACCL
columns.description: Classification of the account (may link to a reference table)

columns.name: AGACNO
columns.description: Numeric identifier for the account

columns.name: CTRL
columns.description: Internal control or validation field (may be used in error detection)

columns.name: NOTENM
columns.description: Name of the note or additional document information

columns.name: CHDT
columns.description: Date when the record was last changed

columns.name: CHTM
columns.description: Type of change or modification (may link to a reference table)

columns.name: CHUSR
columns.description: User who last modified the record

columns.name: LCKST
columns.description: Current lock status of the record (may link to a reference table)

columns.name: CHPRC
columns.description: Price at which the change was made (may be used for tracking changes in pricing)

columns.name: CHSM
columns.description: Digitally signed change or modification record

columns.name: CR
columns.description: Flag indicating a credit transaction (debit or receipt)

columns.name: EMPNO
columns.description: Employee identifier who performed the action

columns.name: TXT2
columns.description: Second text field, possibly used for additional descriptions or comments (may link to a reference table)

columns.name: VOGR1
columns.description: First voice group identifier (used in certain transaction types)

columns.name: VOGR2
columns.description: Second voice group identifier (used in certain transaction types)

columns.name: PREVVONO
columns.description: Number of the previous version of this document

columns.name: TRANSST
columns.description: Status of the transaction within a document or process flow

columns.name: VATAM
columns.description: Amount of value-added tax (VAT) applicable to the transaction

columns.name: TMPTR
columns.description: Temporary reference for pending or provisional transactions

columns.name: PICTNO
columns.description: Identifier of a related picture or image file (may link to an asset management table)

columns.name: WEBPG
columns.description: URL pointing to the document's associated web page or more detailed information

columns.name: R1
columns.description: Additional information field 7 (possibly used for status or reference)

columns.name: R2
columns.description: Additional information field 8 (possibly used for status or reference)

columns.name: R3
columns.description: Additional information field 9 (possibly used for status or reference)

columns.name: R4
columns.description: Additional information field 10 (possibly used for status or reference)
